description_long: This is a compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel and a distinctive, dark wooden pistol grip. The receiver and part of the barrel are adorned with a decorative, possibly floral or tentacle-like pattern in shades of purple, white, and gold, giving it a unique and customized appearance. The fore-end is ribbed and appears to be made of a dark, textured polymer or wood, designed for a secure grip during operation. The twin barrels are matte black, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall build is robust and utilitarian. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The shotgun's compact size and lack of a full stock suggest it is intended for close-quarters use, typical in urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a dark wooden pistol grip and decorative purple and gold receiver. Features a ribbed fore-end and matte black twin barrels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the decorative receiver, ribbed fore-end, and dark wooden pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the twin barrels and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same decorative receiver and grip, with clear visibility of the pump mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the pistol grip and the alignment of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, matte black with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
